en: I like English.
You like Chinese.
I like my English teacher.
I like your book.
I like red.
I like your phone.

zh: 我们喜欢他们的大房子。
en: We like their big house.
They like your dog.
Tea or coffee?
I drink juice.
You drink water.
More hot coffee?
Hello!
Hello, good morning.
I am a student.
She is a teacher.
Is this your computer?

zh: 是的，这是我的电脑，谢谢！
en: Yes, this is my computer, thanks!

zh: 打扰一下，这是你的钱包吗？
en: Excuse me, is this your wallet?
No, this is not my wallet.
Hello, are you Anna?
Yes, I am Anna.
Are you from China?
Yes, I am from Beijing.
I speak a little English.
Your English is good!
Hi, good morning!
Hi, a coffee, please.
Would you like a sandwich?

zh: 是的，我想要一份奶酪三明治，谢谢。
en: Yes, I'd like a cheese sandwich, please.
Have a nice day!
Are you a teacher?
Yes, I'm a teacher.

zh: 你的朋友是出租车司机吗？
en: Is your friend a taxi driver?
No, she is a doctor.
How much is this coat?
It is ten dollars.
I need two black hats.
This jacket is expensive!
I like this shirt.
Is your mother American?
Yes, she is American.
How old is your son?
My son is four years old.
This is a nice restaurant.
A table for one, please.
I would like more coffee.
With sugar?

zh: 我们想要一个披萨，谢谢。
en: We would like a pizza, please.
Check, please!
I speak English and Chinese.

zh: 我们需要一位新的中文老师。
en: We need a new Chinese teacher.
They have an English exam today.
That is an important question.
I like my school.

zh: 打扰一下，这是你的钥匙吗？
en: Excuse me, is this your key?
No, that's not my key.
Her dress is very beautiful.
Is this our camera?
Yes, that's our camera.
Are they your friends?

zh: 是的，我们是最好的朋友。
en: Yes, we are best friends.
Your friends are funny.
Are your parents here?
Yes, I love my parents.

zh: 我住在伦敦，但我不会说英语。
en: I live in London, but I don't speak English.
Do they speak French?
They speak a little French.

zh: 他们有新的电话号码吗？
en: Do they have a new phone number?
Sorry, I don't know.
Nice to meet you.
What do you do, Ben?
I work at a hospital.
Do you work with Anna?

zh: 是的，安娜和我在医院一起工作。
en: Yes, Anna and I work together at a hospital.
Hot coffee?
I never drink coffee.
She eats breakfast every day.
He eats an egg every day.

zh: 她喜欢咖啡，但我喜欢茶。
en: She likes coffee, but I like tea.
Does he like to play basketball?

zh: 他有时和本一起打篮球。
en: He sometimes plays basketball with Ben.
He likes to play tennis.
She doesn't like to draw.

zh: 她喜欢看电影，但我喜欢读书。
en: She likes to watch movies, but I like to read books.
I need a taxi.
To the train station. Please.
Where is the ticket office?
The ticket office is over there?
The train is late.
We want to go shopping today.
Do you want to buy some clothes?
I want to buy two dresses.
How much is this book?
That book is sixteen dollars.

zh: 我爷爷和他的狗住在一起。
en: My grandpa lives with his dog.
Does your grandpa often watch TV?

zh: 他通常和朋友一起看电影。
en: He usually watches movies with his friends.
Is his hair blue?

zh: 是的，他的头发是蓝色的。
en: Yes, his hair is blue.
What would you like to have for lunch.

zh: 我想今天做一种不同的三明治。
en: I would like to make a different kind of sandwich today.
Is that beef?
My husband doesn't eat beef.
This is pork, not beef.
There are six rooms in the house.
Is there a table in your kitchen?

zh: 是的，我们通常在厨房吃早餐。
en: Yes, we usually eat breakfast in the kitchen.

zh: 我办公室里有一张小床。
en: There is a small bed in my office.

zh: 我们需要一个新的厕所。
en: We need a new toilet.
It is hot today.
It is cold in Beijing.
Do you like the weather in Beijing?
No, it snows a lot in the winter.
The weather is nice here in the summer.
This is Amma's farm.
Is there a chicken under the tree?
That dog has big ears.
Birds have very short legs.
That fish is beautiful.
Emma, what time is it?
It is five o'clock in the morning.
What time do you go to school?
I usually go to school at eight o'clock.
Is the basketball game to Thursday?
Look! Our teacher is here!
Please open your book.
Don't use my red pen.
See you tomorrow, Mr. Wang.
See you tomorrow.

zh: 房子后面有公交车站吗？
en: Is there a bus stop behind the house?

zh: 她的房子在地铁站旁边。
en: Her house is next to the subway station.
Is there a hotel near the airport?
This place is always busy.
Is that a famous museums?

zh: 巴黎有很多著名的博物馆。
en: There are many famous museums in Paris.
She can speak four languages.
Do you play the guitar or the piano?
I don't play the guitar very well.
Anna doesn't cook very well.
He wants to dance, but he can't.
Can I have a cop of tea?
Is it pork or beef?
Can I sit next to the window?

zh: 我可以给你拿饮料吗，安娜？
en: Can I get you a drink, Anna?

zh: 好的，谢谢。我想要一杯茶。
en: Yes, please. I'd like a cup of tea.

zh: 你可以在这里付饮料费。
en: You can pay for your drinks here.
Happy birthday, Anna!
These flowers are for you!
I love you!
There is a birthday cake for you!
I love cake!
Are you cleaning the kitchen right now?
We're cooking dinner now.
They are talking about French food.
Duo is reading a book now.

zh: 他在读一本关于中国食物的书。
en: He is reading a book about Chinese food.
Is it Saturday or Sunday?
It's Saturday, not Sunday.

zh: 本通常在早上九点起床。
en: Ben usually gets up at nine o'clock in the morning.
He always watches movies at night.

zh: 我们通常在晚上十一点睡觉。
en: We usually go to the bed at eleven.
Who is that girl?
Can you see her?

zh: 她有一顶昂贵的灰色帽子。
en: She has an expensive gray hat.
Do you know her?
I don't like her.
Do you like to play sports?

zh: 篮球是我最喜欢的运动。
en: Basketball is my favorite sport.
Let's go outside!

zh: 妈妈，我可以出去踢足球吗？
en: Mom, can I play soccer outside?
You need to stay here.

zh: 我们为他的生日开个派对吧！
en: Let's have a party for his birthday!
Welcome, Ben and Anna, what's up?
Do you like this song?
This is my favorite song.

zh: 我可以给你拿点冰淇淋吗？
en: Can I get you some ice cream?
Sure, I love ice cream!
I love summer holidays!
The weather is beautiful!
Let's have a picnic!

zh: 我们可以一起在海滩游泳！
en: We can swim together at the beach!
We are having a good time!
I need to buy new winter boots.

zh: 那双棕色靴子更便宜吗？
en: Are those brown boots cheaper?
The boots are fifty dollars.
Which blouse is more beautiful?
This new blouse is more beautiful.

zh: 你今天需要参加考试吗？
en: Do you need to take a test today?

zh: 是的，学生们今天需要参加考试。
en: Yes, the students need to take a test today.
This test is more difficult.
Which bag is smaller?
My bag is smaller than Anna's bag.
What are we going to do tomorrow?

zh: 我们明天在咖啡馆见面吧。
en: Let's meet at a cafe tomorrow.
What time do you want to meet?

zh: 我们可以上午11点见面吗？
en: Can we meet at 11 a.m.?
Please call me tonight.
Let's take a trip in the summer!
Yes! I want to visit the UK.

zh: 伦敦是英国最冷的城市吗？
en: Is London the coldest city in the UK?

zh: 这是英国最贵的餐厅吗？
en: Is this the most expensive restaurant in the UK?

zh: 那是那座城市最有趣的博物馆。
en: That is the most interesting museum in that city.

zh: 这是你在这里的第一周吗？
en: Is this your first week here?

zh: 这是我在这里的第二周！
en: This is my second week here!

zh: 你们公司在这栋楼里吗？
en: Is your company in this building?

zh: 是的，这是我们的办公楼。
en: Yes, this is our office building.
Do you usually work from home?

zh: 是的，我们每天在家工作。
en: Yes, we work from home every day.

zh: 孩子们今天感觉怎么样？
en: How do the kids feel today?
Are they tired?
Ben is very tired.
Do you feel hungry or tired?
I feel very hungry!
Anna likes this small town.

zh: 这里有很多不错的咖啡馆。
en: It has many good coffee shops.

zh: 安娜的房子是这条街上最漂亮的。
en: Anna has the most beautiful house on this street.

zh: 这条街上也有一家咖啡馆。
en: There's also a coffee shop on this street.

zh: 它是世界上最好的咖啡馆。
en: It is the best coffee shop in the world.
When will you get married?
We will get married next August.
Where will you live next year?

zh: 我丈夫和我明年将搬到法国。
en: My husband and I will move to France next year.
Let's have a dance party!

zh: 你能邀请安娜来参加派对吗？
en: Can you invite Anna to the party?

zh: 我的朋友也会和我一起来。
en: My friend will come with me as well.
I'll get there at 6 p.m.

zh: 你可以和我们坐在一起！
en: You can sit with us!
This is our new home.
There is a piano in her living room.
This is a beautiful bookcase!

zh: 每个卧室里都有电视吗？
en: Is there a television in each bedroom?
Which room is bigger, the living room or the kitchen?
The living room is bigger than the kitchen.
What's the date?
It's September sixth.
Fall begins in September.
What time will you finish work tonight?
I usually finish work at 6 p.m.

zh: 艾玛想带我们参观她的新房子。
en: Emma wants to show us her new house.
Which house is closer to the farm?

zh: 他们的新房子离他们的农场更近。
en: Their new house is closer to their farm.

zh: 我想带你去看农场上的动物！
en: I want to show you the animals on the farm!

zh: 他们的农场里有很多动物。
en: There are many animals on their farm.
Was it cloudy in Shanghai yesterday?
It was cloudy yesterday, but it was hot.
It's always cloudy here in spring.
Was it warmer in New York yesterday?
It was warmer yesterday.

zh: 我们去年开车游览了美国。
en: We traveled in the US by car last year.

zh: 去年夏天我们在迈阿密和波士顿住过。
en: We stayed in Miami and Boston last summer.
Did you enjoy your trip to Miami?

zh: 是的，迈阿密有美丽的海滩！
en: Yes, Miami has beautiful beaches!

zh: 你去年去纽约旅行了吗？
en: Did you travel to New York last year?

zh: 是的，我们去年冬天游览了纽约。
en: Yes, we traveled in New York last winter.

zh: 我真的很享受英国之旅！
en: I really enjoyed my trip to England!

zh: 我可以问你一些关于你生活的问题吗？
en: Can I ask you some questions about your life?

zh: 你的父母在一个著名的乐队吗？
en: Were your parents in a famous band?

zh: 不，我们的爸爸从事音乐行业。
en: No, our dad was in the music business.
His job was very interesting.

zh: 我爷爷是一位非常出色的吉他手。
en: My grandpa was a very good guitar player.
What's wrong, Emma?

zh: 我昨天没去学校，因为我生病了。
en: I wasn't at school yesterday because I was sick.
Did you see a doctor yesterday?

zh: 是的，我需要吃这种药一周。
en: Yes, I have to take this medicine for one week.

zh: 现在吃这种药，明天你会好起来的。
en: Take this medicine now, and you will feel better tomorrow.
Were you in London last week?

zh: 是的，我们上周末到达伦敦。
en: Yes, we arrived in London last weekend.

zh: 我们在大本钟前拍了照片。
en: We took photos in front of Big Ben.

zh: 我们在一家昂贵的咖啡馆喝了下午茶。
en: We had afternoon tea at an expensive cafe.
I remember this place.

zh: 我学校旁边有一个图书馆。
en: There was a library next to my school.
When did you finish school?
In 1990, I was fourteen years old.
We moved to Japan in 1995.
Are you Korean?

zh: 是的，我奶奶是韩国人，我爷爷是中国人。
en: Yes, my grandma is Korean, and my grandpa is Chinese.
We have never been to the US.

zh: 我们在这座城市已经住了十年了。
en: We have lived in this city for ten years.
I have been to many countries in Asia.

zh: 我们看到了这家服装店的广告。
en: We saw an ad for this clothes store.

zh: 那家店里有各种各样的衣服。
en: There are different kinds of clothes in that store.
Would you like to pay with a credit card?
I usually pay with a credit card.

zh: 我们昨天参加了汉语听力考试。
en: We took a Chinese listening test yesterday.
How did you do on the test?
There were many difficult questions.

zh: 我们需要练习听力和口语。
en: We need to practice listening and speaking.
Listening is harder than speaking.

zh: 爸爸昨晚做了我最喜欢的食物！
en: Dad cooked my favorite food last night!

zh: 你可以把鸡肉放在这个盘子里。
en: You can put the chicken on this dish.

zh: 你能在超市买一袋米吗？
en: Can you get a bag of rice at the supermarket?

zh: 每个星期六，他做晚饭，我洗碗。
en: Every Saturday, he cooks dinner and I wash the dishes.

zh: 他昨晚煮了米饭，我现在正在做猪肉。
en: He cooked rice last night, and I am cooking pork now.
Dinner is ready!

zh: 我们老板今天不在办公室。
en: Our boss is not in the office today.
Did you get an email from him?

zh: 我们收到了关于会议的通知。
en: We got the message about the meeting.
We'll have a meeting tomorrow, see you then!
See you then.
I can't find my wallet anywhere.
Is this wallet yours?

zh: 这不是我的钱包，那个黑色的钱包是我的。
en: This is not my wallet, that black wallet is mine.

zh: 这个塑料玩具是她的吗？
en: Is this plastic toy hers?

zh: 不，那个抽屉里的玩具是她的。
en: No, the toys in that drawer are hers.
There is no pizza in the kitchen.

zh: 我们没有咖啡，我们把它加到购物清单上吧！
en: We have no coffee, let's add it to the list!

zh: 这家杂货店没有很多麦片。
en: This grocery store doesn't have much cereal.
That bread looks bad.

zh: 这些胡萝卜看起来很新鲜。
en: These carrots look fresh.
Is she an actor?

zh: 那个女人是一位著名的加拿大演员！
en: That woman is a famous Canadian actor!
She is as pretty as a flower!

zh: 她的头发不像你的那么长。
en: Her hair is not as long as yours.

zh: 她是一个非常友善的人。
en: She's a very kind person.
Did you live here ten years ago?

zh: 是的，我们房子旁边有一个湖。
en: Yes, there was a lake next to our house.
I really miss that lake.

zh: 那时我只会一点点英语。
en: I only knew a little English then.

zh: 我的邻居教我英语和西班牙语。
en: My neighbor taught me English and Spanish.

zh: 你想中午一起吃午餐吗？
en: Do you want to have lunch together at noon?
Sure, I'd love to.
I'd like something sweet.

zh: 这里的甜点总是很优秀。
en: The dessert here is always excellent.

zh: 谢谢你的花，它们太漂亮了！
en: Thank you for the flowers, they are so beautiful!
It was a crazy day yesterday!
Oh no, what happened?

zh: 昨天我邻居房子附近发生了火灾。
en: There was a fire near my neighbor's house yesterday.

zh: 我首先看到了火，然后我打了电话给警察。
en: I saw the fire first, and then I called the police.
The police finally arrived.
How often do you go camping?

zh: 我们每年夏天都在这里露营。
en: We camp here every summer.
The children hate cleaning the house.
He has a singing competition tomorrow.

zh: 吃太多冰淇淋对她不好。
en: Eating too much ice cream is bad for her.

zh: 你能告诉我去机场的路吗？
en: Can you show me the directions to the airport?
Here is a map of this city.
The airport is two miles away from here.

zh: 你不需要在这里右转，继续直走。
en: You don't need to take a right here, go straight.

zh: 继续直走到这条街的尽头。
en: Go straight to the end of this street.
I'll go to college in the fall.
What subjects are you interested in?

zh: 我对物理和生物很感兴趣。
en: I'm very interested in physics and biology.
Is biology difficult?
Biology is difficult, but it's interesting.

zh: 下一班去北京的飞机什么时候？
en: When is the next flight to Beijing?

zh: 这班飞机两小时后起飞。
en: This flight is leaving in two hours.

zh: 我需要订下一班飞机的票。
en: I need a ticket for the next flight.
The train is leaving soon.

zh: 我们要在火车上呆多久？
en: How long will we be on the train?

zh: 我们将在火车上两个小时。
en: We'll be on the train for two hours.
I have a cold.

zh: 我应该打电话给医生吗？
en: Should I call the doctor?
I made an appointment for ten.
Please take this medicine after every meal.

zh: 你应该吃这种药，然后好好休息。
en: You should take this medicine, and then get some rest.
My computer isn't working.
Should I ask for help?

zh: 请问，先生，我的电脑不工作了。
en: Excuse me, sir, my computer isn't working.

zh: 机器现在工作了，干得好！
en: The machine is working now, good job!
Thank you for your help.
Tomorrow is New Year's Day.
What are you going to do on New Year's Day?

zh: 我想在明年开始时庆祝。
en: I want to celebrate to begin next year.

zh: 我的朋友和我会看电影。
en: My friend and I will go see a movie.
That sounds fun.
I am your best friend.
Can we go for a walk tonight?

zh: 是的，让我们去外面散步吧。
en: Yes, let's go walk outside.
What a beautiful day!
The weather is beautiful today.
I like thinking by myself.

zh: 我们可以有一个更深刻的友谊。
en: We can have a deeper friendship.
You are a very good friend.
I'm thankful for you.
I want to build a castle.

zh: 我知道一个可以建造城堡的地方。
en: I know a place where I can build a castle.
This will be fun.

zh: 我们可以一起建造一个城堡！
en: We can build a castle together!
The castle will be tall.
I like your idea.
Tell me a story.
Once there was a kingdom.
The king was very wise.

zh: 在这个王国里有一个塔。
en: In this kingdom there was a tower.
This tower was very tall.

zh: 我会给你讲更多的故事。
en: I will tell you more stories.
Let's go on a picnic!
A picnic sounds great!

zh: 我们可以在公园吃东西。
en: We can eat in the park.

zh: 这将是一次很好的冒险。
en: This will be a good adventure.

zh: 我们可以邀请其他朋友。
en: We can invite other friends.
They will like it too.
Can you read books?
Yes, I really like to read books.
What is your favorite book?
My favorite is adventure stories.

zh: 冒险听起来很令人兴奋。
en: Adventures sound exciting.
We can write a story.

zh: 这个房子是我们一起建造的。
en: This house was built by us together.

zh: 这是我们最喜欢的地方。
en: This is our favorite place.

zh: 我们应该给房子的主人打电话。
en: We should call the owner of this house.
This house was built in nineteen fifty.

zh: 所有的地板都是木制的。
en: All of the floors are made of wood.
He hurt himself while he was playing soccer.

zh: 我会带他去看医生做X光检查。
en: I'll take him to the doctor so he can get an X-ray.
My left leg hurts badly.
Your leg is probably broken.

zh: 他在离开医院前做了X光检查。
en: He got an X-ray before he left the hospital.

zh: 你为什么今天这么早就回家了？
en: Why are you home so early today?

zh: 我们打算去航海，但下雨了。
en: We were going to go sailing, but it started to rain.
What should we do instead?
Let's do a puzzle instead.
Could I put the radio on?

zh: 我现在不想放任何音乐。
en: I don't want to put any music on right now.

zh: 嘿，艾玛，我想你的电话在响。
en: Hey Emma, I think your phone is ringing.
Hello, who's calling?
Hey, Emma, it's me, Tom.
Do you want to hang out tomorrow?
Cool, I'd love to.

zh: 现在问你几个问题是个好时机吗？
en: Is it a good time to ask you a few questions?

zh: 对不起，现在真的不是谈话的好时机。
en: I'm sorry, it's really not a good time to talk.

zh: 这个项目有一个小问题。
en: There's a small problem with this project.

zh: 不可能按时完成这个项目。
en: It's not possible to complete this project on time.

zh: 我可能今晚会给你回电话。
en: I can possibly call you back tonight.

zh: 你今天早上看新闻了吗？
en: Did you see the news this morning?
The jewelry store was robbed last night.

zh: 抢劫犯逃走了，警察找不到他。
en: The robber ran away, and the police can't find him.

zh: 我确信他们很快就会抓到那个抢劫犯！
en: I'm sure they'll catch that robber soon!
They caught the robber!

zh: 所有的珠宝都被警察找到了。
en: All the jewelry was found by the police.

zh: 你昨晚睡得怎么样，安娜？
en: How did you sleep last night, Anna?
Did you dream about going to the beach?

zh: 不，我做了一个关于小丑的噩梦！
en: No, I had a bad dream about clowns!
Clowns are scary!

zh: 我知道那是一个可怕的梦，但它不是真的。
en: I know that was a scary dream, but it wasn't real.
There's a back - to - school sale today.

zh: 我们需要购买一些学用品。
en: We need to buy some school supplies.
I want to buy this box of crayons.

zh: 这是我数学课需要的尺子。
en: This is the ruler which I need for math class.

zh: 艾玛只为这些笔记本支付了半价。
en: Emma only paid half price for these notebooks.

zh: 夏天是我最喜欢的季节！
en: Summer is my favorite season!

zh: 我计划今年夏天住在一个岛上。
en: I plan on living on an island this summer.

zh: 记得带防晒霜和太阳镜。
en: Remember to bring sunscreen and sunglasses.

zh: 如果波浪不太大，我们会去游泳。
en: If the waves aren't too big, we'll go swimming.

zh: 教孩子们如何游泳很有趣。
en: It's fun to teach the kids how to swim.
You're new here, aren't you?

zh: 我会把你介绍给你的同事。
en: I'll introduce you to your colleagues.

zh: 如果你有问题，他们会主动帮助你。
en: If you have questions, they will offer to help you.

zh: 隔壁房间是我们开会的地方。
en: The next room is the place where we have meetings.

zh: 在正常的日子里，我们在12点半吃午饭。
en: On a normal day, we eat lunch at half past twelve.
Is that man a celebrity?
Wow, he's so handsome!

zh: 我认识他的未婚妻，她是一名伟大的演员。
en: I know his fiancée, who is a great actor.

zh: 她是一个友善诚实的女人。
en: She's a kind and honest woman.

zh: 他们已经在一起五年了。
en: They've been together for five years.
We're new in town.
How do we get to the city center?
Drive across that bridge.

zh: 这条街有很多咖啡馆，经常很拥挤。
en: This street, which has a lot of cafes, is often busy.

zh: 这家博物馆已经存在六十年了。
en: This museum has been here for sixty years.
